stemHtml: What is true about simultaneous independent approaches?

options.a: All approaches, regardless of the weather conditions, need to be monitored by ATS.
options.b: Crew members ensure separation, radar monitoring is madatory for instrument approach.
options.c: Crew members ensure separation, radar monitoring is madatory when ceiling is below MDA.
options.d: Crew members ensure separation, radar monitoring is madatory when ceiling is below 5000 ft.
